sourceMovie.title: Promare
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Promare works as a animation movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The animation and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Degeneration
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Promare clicked for you, Resident Evil: Degeneration (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and action, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Batman: Bad Blood
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Promare clicked for you, Batman: Bad Blood (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and action, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Promare?
faq.answer: Try Resident Evil: Degeneration, Batman: Bad Blood, Batman: Gotham Knight—each shares DNA with Promare while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Promare?
faq.answer: Promare (2019) is best described as Animation, Action, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Promare part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Promare Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
